description: Bucket rules for Phase 2 external owner handoffs that are not re-acknowledged by the owner step artifacts. These rules encode the accepted P2 global handoff bucket audit remediation, not mechanical routing facts.

rules.audit_action: consider backfill or formal global handoff addendum before M07 implementation
rules.audit_rationale: Audit says future M07 implementer reading only M07 artifacts could miss this wireless policy/MLO/DFS/QoS/RSNO/off-channel handoff.

rules.audit_action: consider backfill or formal global handoff addendum before M10 implementation
rules.audit_rationale: Audit says reset-boot-count storage/recovery rows are deferred to M10 but not re-acknowledged by M10 artifacts.

rules.audit_action: consider backfill or formal global handoff addendum before M11 implementation
rules.audit_rationale: Audit says target-missing/deleted mac80211/hostapd churn rows could be missed by M11 release/provenance validation.

rules.audit_action: decide explicit split across M05/M08/M11 before implementation
rules.audit_rationale: Audit says netdevices.mk mixes Airoha PHY, MediaTek HNAT/offload, and package closure; ownership should not be silently assigned only to M05.

rules.audit_action: keep visible in global worklist; no immediate backfill unless follow-up audit disagrees
rules.audit_rationale: Audit says M05 markdown covers PHY/EEE/PCS/SFP/DSA/10G backports and full wired topics at topic level.

rules.audit_action: keep only in global worklist unless later evidence promotes it
rules.audit_rationale: Audit says MT7988D RFB option-type-2 Wi-Fi/PCIe DTS is supporting context only, not direct 8X truth.

rules.audit_action: keep only in global worklist unless later evidence promotes it
rules.audit_rationale: Audit says MT7987 WED DTS is supporting context only, not direct 8X authority or a normal M08 row.

rules.audit_action: decide explicit M05-primary and M08-secondary split before implementation
rules.audit_rationale: Round1 x5 audit found owner conflict: M05 has exact rewrite row for mixed DSA/non-DSA 10G handling, while M08 may only own QDMA/rate/performance/offload adjacency.

rules.audit_action: consider backfill or formal global handoff addendum before M08 implementation
rules.audit_rationale: Audit says this is a real M08 offload/acceleration entry point that is not explicitly visible in M08 artifacts.

rules.audit_action: consider backfill or formal global handoff addendum before M08 implementation
rules.audit_rationale: Audit says this is a real M08 offload/acceleration entry point that is not explicitly visible in M08 artifacts.

rules.audit_rationale: Audit says this is a real M08 offload/acceleration entry point that is not explicitly visible in M08 artifacts.

rules.audit_rationale: Audit says this is a real M08 offload/acceleration entry point that is not explicitly visible in M08 artifacts.

rules.audit_action: consider backfill or formal global handoff addendum before M08 implementation
rules.audit_rationale: Audit says this is a real M08 offload/acceleration entry point that is not explicitly visible in M08 artifacts.

rules.audit_action: consider backfill or formal global handoff addendum before M08 implementation
rules.audit_rationale: Audit says this is a real M08 offload/acceleration entry point that is not explicitly visible in M08 artifacts.

rules.audit_action: consider backfill or formal global handoff addendum before M08 implementation
rules.audit_rationale: Audit says this is a real M08 offload/acceleration entry point that is not explicitly visible in M08 artifacts.

rules.audit_action: keep visible in global worklist; no immediate backfill unless follow-up audit disagrees
rules.audit_rationale: Audit says M08 markdown covers netfilter/nft flowtable, HNAT, PPE/RSS/LRO, WED/PPE runtime, and acceleration-performance topics.

rules.audit_action: review ownership before implementation; likely M11 package-closure rather than M09
rules.audit_rationale: Audit says package/kernel/linux/modules/usb.mk is package/release validation material, even if M09 cares about USB runtime.

rules.audit_action: consider backfill or formal global handoff addendum before M09 implementation
rules.audit_rationale: Round1 x5 audit found M09 static PCIe/USB topology coverage is insufficient for PCIe controller/TPHY driver behavior; owner artifacts do not explicitly re-acknowledge this file_id/topic.

rules.audit_action: keep visible in global worklist; no immediate backfill unless follow-up audit disagrees
rules.audit_rationale: Audit says M09 markdown covers LVTS/fan, PWM, USB clock, PCIe expansion, IRQ affinity, soft on/off, and TPHY board-extra topics.
